name: Algorithm
overview: When a pawn reaches the end of the line, the game changes. The real player is the piece that is not seen. The piece that you do not see determines your fate. The next move is always ahead of you. A soldier that reaches the end of the line is not a soldier… it is a Queen!

trailers.title: سریال جدید پلیسی الگوریتم - تیزر | Serial Algorithm - Teaser
